title: CEO Native Issue Handoff Primitives
summary: Governed capability for the CEO agent to execute native paperclipai handoff primitives in real runs.

contract.intent: Convert execution delegation from prompt-only behavior into a firm-owned, verifiable capability.
scopeIn: list child issues with parent filter
create one or more child issues
assign created child issues to eligible workers
scopeOut: implementation work by the CEO on parent issue
ad-hoc dependency installs in isolated worktrees
forbiddenActions: prompt-only delegation without real child issues
switching providers or global model strategy during proof
broad repo exploration before mandatory child-status read
successCriteria: all four primitives are visible in one fresh real CEO run
child issue is created and assigned to an eligible worker
proof uses canonical repo-root CLI boundary
failureModes: model admission capacity before first tool call
run shell launched from isolated worktree without repo-root --dir usage
contract.rollbackPlan: If verification fails after regression, revert to the last verified commit and rerun exactly one bounded CEO proof before further changes.

primitives.title: List Child Issues
primitives.description: Reads child issue truth for the current parent issue before any further decision.

primitives.title: List Agents
primitives.description: Lists current agents to locate an eligible worker.

primitives.title: Create Child Issue
primitives.description: Creates child packet issue with project and parent linkage.

primitives.title: Assign Child Issue
primitives.description: Assigns created child issue to worker agent.

verify.notes: Run reached post-tool capacity cooldown after proving all four primitives in one real CEO run.
